summary: go.mod module path and all internal imports use the published catalog path (github.com/mvanhorn/printing-press-library/library/<category>/<slug>), not the generator's local slug module name.
reason: A fresh local generate emits 'module <slug>-pp-cli'; the published library requires the full repo-rooted module path so unauthenticated 'go install' resolves correctly. verify-library-conventions and verify-supply-chain both hard-fail any other module directive.
